reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Manuel Aguilar threw Me because I had to many bags My personal belongings and My HUSBAND he thrrew AWAY His URN and ALL My jewelry was gone he physically threw Me out I'm 68yrs old I Had to go to emergency stayed a week quality inn needs to DRUG test there employees he was in DRUGS sweating ranting throwing away My belongings 
I'm going to put a lawsuit against Elderly Abuse and sleeping outside I got PNEUMONIA lawsuit

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The large room
reviews.negatives: No breakfast, no maid service in a week, too expensive second week

reviews.title: Roaches/Horrible customer service
reviews.text: Don’t ever stay here!  Roaches in rooms, homeless come in and eat breakfast with you, the stench outside of human urine is unbearable!  Manager Luis kicked me out because I showed the roach and stated I would call the Health Dept. I strongly feel discriminated against! I wish I could upload the photos of have of the roaches and the filth around/behind the bed and all the rest!  Roomkeepers doesn’t speak any English! Terrible location were the homeless just hang out on the stairs, by your room always asking for something.  Quite dangerous around the hotel!  No security at the hotel as well!  I’ll never stay here again!  I advise you don’t either!  Bugs, bugs and more bugs! 🤢

reviews.title: would never stay here again
reviews.positives: nothing
reviews.negatives: smelled like pee and sheets were dirty

reviews.title: Filthy location/terrible service
reviews.text: Hotel front desk female Indian person with glasses is very rude/embellishes. My room had roaches, and food all behind the bed.  Took photos, showed and mentioned health dept. and was kicked out! I’m disabled and non white! I feel strongly discriminated against and do not recommend this place to no one! Homeless are allowed to just come in and steal the breakfast food that us patrons pay for.  The entire facility smells of human urine and fecal matter! Homeless hang out on the stairs, by room doors making it totally unsafe!  You’ve been warned!  Noisy and the breakfast you’ll have to wait an eternity to have things replenished. Roomkeeping speaks no English!  Awful experience to say the least!  BBB will be contacted!

reviews.negatives: Very noisy,, I requested my room to be cleaned by putting out their sign however my room WAS NIT cleaned, My reservation was cancelled not sure by whom, and I was forced to cut my stay by 1 day as the room I paid for In advance was not available and would not cover the room available (I booked a king for $246 and they gave me 2 queen and wanted me to pay 150mire.The purpose of my visit was to visit both my grandchildren and my great grand grandchildren and missed out on my 10 year olds great granddaughters bc baseball tournament on SUNDAY as my drive home was 6 hours. I am almost 70 years old traveling alone and not comfortable driving at night.

reviews.title: Nice staff, bad behaving guests
reviews.text:
It’s super hard when you like the staff, the room looks good, and then other guests go and ruin things by their disrespectful  behavior. 
The nighttime manager said it best when he said, you’ll never change those people.  It all comes down to how people are raised. Because of the price, and more likely because of the location, disrespectful people were there partying right outside my room, setting off the smoke alarm at 10:45 PM. When the manager asked them to turn it off, they went upstairs and started tromping back and forth.  

I did not feel Safe and promptly checked out at 6:45 AM before the party makers woke up.  I went to another chain hotel for $50 more and all was safe and respectful.

reviews.title: Scared to stay
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Nice room but ...
reviews.text: I was told I had to leave a $100 cash security deposit on check-in.  Wasn't expecting that, thankfully I had enough cash.  When I checked out I had to wait in the lobby for 15 minutes while the clerk went and inspected the room before I got my deposit back.  Also there was no housekeeping for the 3 nights I was there.  When I checked out I was told I had to call and request housekeeping each day - would have been nice to know this when I checked in.  Too bad they missed the tips I left on my pillow each day.

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.negatives: They accused someone smoking and made them pay. Without showing any evidence to the accused victims.

reviews.title: Low Budget
reviews.text: This hotel is ok for a low budget place , but not somewhere I would take my kids. People fixing complete engines in parking lot, prostitutes hanging around plus a lot of people asking for money and drugs after dark. Didn't feel safe won't be back here

reviews.title: Horrible website
reviews.positives: Nothing, never got a room, hotel said I had no reservation on 7/26 Friday, had next day reservation also. The lady at the front desk Osh said we had no reservation for that day or the next.
reviews.negatives: That I didn't have a room after 11 hours of driving. Will never you booking ever again and will tell all my friends to never use booking

reviews.title: Do not use this hotel or booking.com

reviews.title: Good Stay with Convenient Location
reviews.text: The property offers a clean and well-maintained environment with friendly staff, making for a pleasant stay. Its location is convenient, especially for shopping, though the views leave something to be desired. Facilities are adequate and contribute to overall comfort, providing good value without any major drawbacks.

reviews.title: AWFUL UNPLEASANT FELT VERY UNEASY AND UNSAFE.
reviews.positives: The room was okay it had a horrible stench of old cigarettes, even though I specifically asked for a room that was non smoking.
reviews.negatives: The staff was ODD. I was checked in at the front by a woman and she had her newborn with her everything was fine. Until about around 5AM I was woken up by loud banging on my door I look over to the door and notice it was unlocked but I had the door stopper put in place. I immediately jumped out of bed to see what the commotion was. It was hotel front desk a man telling me that the room was supposed to be vacant and nobody should have been inside and I said I had paid for it and was given the room key earlier that night. And I had asked if he knew why my door was unlocked it’s because he tried to enter the room while I was asleep. I went to the front with him to sort this out I was very upset as I drove over 7 hours to get to that hotel. I was so tired and to be disturbed over this was just not pleasant at all. When we went to the front is when he had told me about a note the woman from the night that had checked me in wrote “KEEP AN EYE ON ROOM 127 MAKE SURE TO CHECK ROOM” and I could tell that she wrote it bc it matched the handwriting with the key card she gave me. There was no recollection of me being checked into the room at all because apparently she forgot to put it in the system or so the front desk guy said. Over all it was one of the scariest strangest experiences I’ve had at any motel/hotel and I’ve been to several and I mean SEVERAL and this has never happened to me before I have pics of the note she wrote and my keycard with the same writing.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Front desk was so helpful.  When we first checked in the a/c didn't work the front desk guy came through and switched us to a room that a/c works

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Good stay

reviews.title: It reeked of marijuana and we had loud drunk/high man and woman screaming all night long and literally pounding on o
reviews.positives: Not a thing
reviews.negatives: Dirty, unsafe, unhelpful staff

reviews.title: Diamond in the Rough
reviews.text: Rooms are nice. If you close and lock the door, you can almost forget where you are located.  They got waffles!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: the staff was awful. We waited 30 minutes while the couple in front of us got checked in. I don’t know why it took forever. The guy then started to help us. We were there for about 20 minutes. He took our IDs etc. then another lady comes in and they start doing shift change. He talks to her for about 15 minutes updating her and just leaves us standing there then he leaves without saying a word. The lady then takes over starts our whole process again. She asks if we want a downstairs or upstairs. We say downstairs. She says ok. She finishes checking us in and ended up giving us two upstairs rooms. We have a grandmother in a wheelchair which cannot go upstairs. So she then looks for more rooms. Finds us two rooms downstairs right next to each other which is perfect. She apologized for everything said she would get us an early check in by 2:30 and  would call us when it was ready. She never called us and by 3 oclock which is check in time, our rooms still hadn’t been touched by house keeping and we’re still completely dirty from whoever was in the room last. I had a tweeker above me who was up all night banging and stomping on the floor. Kept me up all night. Had weirdos walking up and down and you can hear them talking to   themselves outside your door. Worst experience ever! The only good thing was once the room was cleaned it was very nice. Spacious, clean,  comfortable.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Better then it used to be by far.

reviews.title: Horrible. Disgusting. Money hungry dumbasses!
reviews.positives: Nothing absolutely hated it
reviews.negatives: I didn’t.. I hated it

reviews.title: Home away from home
reviews.text: Great place. Staff is outstanding. Clean, safe and smells good.          BUT, if you really need the internet, get a room as close to the office as possible.

reviews.title: Never again
reviews.negatives: Booked for 2 nights.. checked out after first night. Checked out on time. Would not Refund me for second night.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: It was the best price.

reviews.title: Disaster City
reviews.positives: Nothing.  It was a disaster.
reviews.negatives: Where do I begin?  Upon my arrival,  the woman who greeted me was anything but friendly.  If she'd smiled her face would have cracked and I tried to soften her but nothing worked.  She was just sour.  This was an older woman who didn't belong in a position of greeting new customers.  She gave me the wrong room and when I went back to get it corrected she insisted that I didn't have a room with 2 queen beds but one with a king.  There were 3 people.  We needed 2 beds.  I went back to the room and called corporate and they straightened it out.  Next she put us in a room with 2 queen beds and when I walked in I couldn't believe what I was seeing.  The bedspreads looked like someone had peed on them and the chair in the corner looked the same.  I tore off the bedspreads and threw them outside and did the same with the chair.  We didn't walk on the carpets without shoes.  I was afraid of bedbugs or other creatures.  My room was non-refundable or I would have left.  The breakfast was a joke.  Cereal, waffles, /orange juice, and coffee.  No eggs or meat of any kind.  Worst selection of any motel I've stayed at and I've stayed at lots.  Never again.

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.text: Great staff, location and amenities in room.

reviews.title: Skip, don’t come here
reviews.positives: Quality Inn wants $150 cash deposit OR to charge your card $150 and keep it for a week. They have your card on file. I don’t see the purpose of this and it is a very big inconvenience. This is in a bad part of town. My non-smoking room stinks like weed. The curtains are torn. The toilet seat is a mismatch for the toilet, very uncomfortable. This is a cheap place but it’s not worth it. There are homeless outside. I tried to cancel, but they wouldn’t let me without charging me the full price.
reviews.negatives: The deposit. I will never stay in another Quality Inn as long as I live. This is an extraordinarily subpar motel. I didn’t expect this from Quality  Inn but now I know better.

reviews.title: Updated rooms!
reviews.text: Nice updated rooms. The surrounding area has a lot of homeless outside. Good value at least.

reviews.title: Neighborhood was decent.
reviews.positives: N/a
reviews.negatives: First off I didn't like there was a 100.00 deposit fee that booking .com dosent tell you about. You find out the day you check in at the front desk.....the room smelled like straight up dogs. Flies were all in the room.  The carpet was wet. There was a big red stain on the carpet ( wasn't sure if it was juice or blood). When I stripped the bed there was brown and red stains on the mattress.

reviews.title: Love it
reviews.text: Great place

reviews.title: I question the 2&1/2 stars it had on booking.com. It is more like 1-star.
reviews.negatives: $150 incidentals fee immediately charged uon check-in, refund allegedly comes several days after checkout. Signs posted all over the check-in lobby about fees for this and fees for that, including prices charged for stolen linens, and so on. I felt like I was entering a high security prison, accentuated by the huge plexiglass screen completely surrounding the check-in desk, Is this hotel located in a high-crime area? The bath sink does not fit the counter top. It was mounted close to, but not directly to, the counter top. The remaining half inch gap between sink and counter was filled with silicone sealer that was peeling away, leaving holes, and it was dirty. The sink faucet was loose in the counter top. The carpet had been recently cleaned and was still wet in spots. When walking from the carpet onto the tile floor in the bath the first time, the soles of my shoes were wet and I did not realize that. I slipped on the tile floor and nearly fell down. Breakfast consisted of three options - waffle mix in a pouch to be used in questionable waffle irons, two kinds of children's cereal, and a bowl with a few apples. No eggs, no bread of any kind, The orange juice was watery thin. The entire hotel spoke of cheap owners excessively cutting corners everywhere they could. The only upside was that the bed was actually comfortable.

reviews.title: Small Family stay
reviews.text:
My family and I arrived late Friday night. Front desk was open and nice. Check in was easy. 100 dollars cash or 150 card for room deposit. 

The room was spacious, not much storage room for a group of four but was fine. There's plenty of food and shops around. 

Check out was also easy

reviews.title: Dirty and I couldn't even get a hot meal like I was expecting in the morning.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: We stayed here overnight. Close to scandia, the mall and several food spots.

reviews.title: Substandard, poor stay, worthless breakfast, bad area
reviews.positives: The security of lobby door being locked after entering
reviews.negatives: Called and paid in advance for the room about 12pm the day of check-in to have them check my sister (with health problems) in since I was going to arrive after, was told not a problem, that my card went through and the person wrote down her name. She ended up waiting for an hour for me to arrive since the staff forgot to share it with the next shift. Thankfully the front desk person allowed her to stay in the lobby, since she kept it secure by keeping the door locked, were some shadey men in the parking lot. Got woken up several times during the night by guest in the room above ours, walking around loudly in their room. Went down for breakfast at 7:30, there was no staff at the front desk to assist. Didn't realize the waffle iron wasn't on until after pour batter in it. It never warmed up and I left half a burned waffle in it. There was no protein option other than high sugar yogurt. Other than that, instant coffee out of a machine. Orange juice machine was empty. Only had apples and high sugar cereal as other options. Staff got there late with wet hair and started looking in the cupboards for the orange juice. We ended up going across the street to McDonald's for breakfast. We travel a lot and this hotel is not on our list for future recommendations.

reviews.negatives: It is a bad location. We stayed 3 nights and not once was any service provided for our room. The room smelled of smoke. We were locked out of our room each day we returned and had to have front desk reset the key. The staff didn’t update that we were staying consecutive days and set our room key for one day. The juice machine was broken at breakfast, leaving the only beverage option as tea or coffee.

reviews.title: The room reeked of cigarette smoke.  The hotel is a non-smoking hotel.  Go figure.
reviews.negatives: I think Booking.com should investigate whether this hotel tries to book rooms that have already been reserved, if they think the person who reserved it will not show.  I pay great attention to the dynamic of paying to have the right to cancel.  Sometimes I pay extra for that.  For the last 2 stays at this place, they have called me the evening of my arrival, when I was driving, to ask if I was coming.  Both times, I had reserved the room, and would lose the price of my 1st night of stay.  So, I believe they are looking to rent rooms when people do not show up, and collect both the penalty price and the extra price they charge for the new guest.   I don't like being called and asked if I'm coming when I have paid to come.   They also mention that at 3AM, they can repurpose the room.  Are you aware of any of this?

reviews.negatives: Breakfast wasn’t as commercial advertised not very much selection to choose from and what was there had hardly anything

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The staff was amazing, professional, personable, friendly, helpful.
reviews.negatives:
The breakfast was SAD!!!! Very little to choose from: apples, orange/apple juice~Nasty, sour. Old looking cold cereal, waffle/waffle maker, yoplait yogurt, coffee, tea.   No meat, potatoes, eggs, bagels, pastries of any kind.  Breakfast included in the ad is a JOKE.  There were other visitors that felt the same way and they went elsewhere for breakfast  I ended up getting yogurt and went to IHOP down the street for a real breakfast and it was Delicious 😋 Also the Ice Machine was out of order during my stay.  I made a mistake when choosing my lodging, I was supposed to go to Comfort Inn, where they provide a Delicious breakfast with everything you didn't have.  They had waffles, pastries, the best tasting orange and apple juice, individual hot and cold fresh cereal.
I made a mental note to NEVER stay at another Quality Inn EVER.   Aside from the awesome customer service this place is awful 😞

reviews.negatives:
Didn't like the fact at checkout was charged $30 for a couple of stains on towels that we used to.clean up spill in microwave or counter. They claim wouldn't be able to get stain out . I didn't believe it then or now .for $30 I could have gotten a set of 6 very nice towels. Not pay for for 2 and wouldn't give me. The towels. And still waiting for  $100 deposit for last visit. This time I stayed and check with housekeeping to make sure everything was OK with the room and there were no stains of any kind on sheets or towels.
Personally I think that 1 housekeeper and front desk person ripped us off and split $30 for themselves.

reviews.title: Comfy on a Budget
reviews.positives: Upon checking in, the staff was friendly and approachable. The site was well lite at night. The site set in the middle of a block surrounded by a lot of food options.
reviews.negatives: The rooms are outdated. The TV would lose signal at time.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The room and bed was comfortable and the staff were helpful and courteous.
reviews.negatives: I went to take a shower and there was a black widow posted in the corner of the shower. Not sure how long it had been there. Luckily my husband took care of it. Also the address was confusing for the doordash person. He went to the wrong place to deliver our food

reviews.title: ALL IN ALL WAS GOOD EXPERINSE
reviews.negatives: Needed more choice for breakfast

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Room was very clean n fresh. Nice breakfast

reviews.title: I had a very relaxing stay and will be back. Thank you
reviews.positives:
Hi,
Room #217
I was in town for a much needed surgery. Everything at the Quality Inn fit my needs for being in town. 
The location was great
The staff was great
I had dental surgery so I could not eat (bummer)
The property grounds where great
The room was very spacious 
The bed slept very comfy
reviews.negatives:
There was a flaw in the celling over the shower that should be repaired. It does not look good at all. Kinda creepy.
 The paint on the exterior door to the bathroom should be painted a more brighter tropical color. The color on there now  gives and old brabby feeling. Makes you feel closed in. A lighter color will go more with the room
